---
title: "About Me"
image: IMG_0461.JPG
---

::: {layout="[[1, 1, 1]]"}
![Study abroad in Chile!](images/IMG_0460.JPG){width="375"}

![Backpacking in Washington!](images/IMG_9471-01.JPG){group="aa" description="Backpacking in Washington" width="375"}

![Taking weather readings for class!](images/clipboard-2394377220.jpeg){width="375"}
:::
